title: Deen Dayalu Coaches
contentHtml:
DEEN DAYALU COACH

  1.  Provision of cushioned luggage racks which can serve as seat during rush. Molded PUF foam seats can be explored.
  2. Provision additional hand hold in doorway area.
  3. Provision of J hooks near longitudinal luggage racks.
  4. Toilets with polymerized floor coating.
  5. Provision of Bio-Toilets.
  6. Water Level indicator.
  7. Toilet occupation indication display board.
  8. Enhanced mobile charging facility.
  9. Fire Extinguishers with anti-theft arrangement.
  10. Pleasing interior and exterior color scheme with anti graffiti measures.
contentMarkdown:
![](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/works/uploads/Image/deendayalu_exterior.jpg)

 **DEEN DAYALU COACH**

1.   Provision of cushioned luggage racks which can serve as seat during rush. Molded PUF foam seats can be explored.
2.  Provision additional hand hold in doorway area.
3.  Provision of J hooks near longitudinal luggage racks.
4.  Toilets with polymerized floor coating.
5.  Provision of Bio-Toilets.
6.  Water Level indicator.
7.  Toilet occupation indication display board.
8.  Enhanced mobile charging facility.
9.  Fire Extinguishers with anti-theft arrangement.
10.  Pleasing interior and exterior color scheme with anti graffiti measures.
